reasoning_chain_text: 1. Identify the system used in the 2010 USGS survey of Assateague Island National Seashore, then determine which NASA facility developed it.
2. Determine which Virginia county contains that facility.
3. Return the largest town in that county.
original_final_question: Can you first idenity the system that was used to survey Assateague Island National Seashore in the 2010 USGS survey. Then, find out which facility this system was developed and which county this facility is located in. Finally, report the largest town in that county. Only report the town. Your response should be in the format [Answer].
original_reasoning_chain: Node 1: Identify the system used to survey Assateague Island National Seashore in 2010 -> EAARL
Node 2 depends on node 1: Find NASA facility where EAARL was developed -> Wallops Flight Facility
Node 3 depends on node 2: Find Virginia county -> Accomack County
Node 4 depends on node 3: Find largest town in Accomack County -> Chincoteague
